name: BetterDealEnquiry
description: Customer is requesting a better price, promotion, or deal on their existing Virgin Media services — they are not discussing contract renewal, switching providers, cancelling, upgrading, or downgrading specifically.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want a better deal on my current package
Can you offer me a {dealRequestType} on my services?
Check if there are any offers available for my account
What can you do about the price I'm paying right now?
I'm paying too much for what I get
Are there any {dealRequestType} deals I can take advantage of?
Give me a more competitive price on my broadband
I'd like to see what {dealRequestType} you have for existing customers
My bill has gone up and I want to know what deals are available
You must have something better than what I'm currently paying
I saw an advert for a cheaper package — can I get that price too?
What's the best you can do for me on my current plan?
Show me current promotions for my services
I just want to see if there's a better price for what I have
Can you apply any {dealRequestType} to my account?
The price went up after my offer ended and I need something more affordable
Are there any deals available to bring my costs down?
I feel like I'm overpaying compared to what new customers get
Look for a better deal on my account please
My neighbour is paying half what I pay — can you sort me out?
What {dealRequestType} do you have right now?
I want to explore cheaper options for my Virgin subscription
Is there anything you can do about my monthly cost?
better deal please
The price I'm paying doesn't feel fair anymore — what can you offer?
